# Fixture: post_unsub_silence
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.2s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Timothy! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Stop
Concierge: You have been unsubscribed from Shiftsmart messages. If you have questions for me, you can text START to this number at any time.
Partner: Get me a real person right now

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
You have been unsubscribed from Shiftsmart messages. If you have questions for me, you can text START to this number at any time.
